## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] `pnpm run example:validate` (if integration behavior changed)

## Compatibility

- [ ] No public API breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Upgrade notes included when needed

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant docs updated (`README`, `docs/`, policies)
- [ ] Examples use package-root imports only

## Checklist

- [ ] Issue linked (if applicable)
- [ ] Scope is focused and excludes unrelated refactors
